title: lavandula minutolii var. minutolii
intro: Lavandula minutolii var. minutolii, also known as Dwarf Spanish Lavender or Lavender 'Minutolii', is a compact, flowering shrub native to the western Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils, which contain anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Lavandula minutolii var. minutolii include its calming effects, which can help reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Lavandula minutolii var. minutolii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flower, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
